results.text: Rian Chudzinski - Stats, Contract, Salary & More - Elite Prospects. Most recently in the QMJHL with Moncton Wildcats. Complete player biography and stats. Rian Chudzinski – DobberProspects. QMJHL Top Prospects Game- Rian stood out with his relentless pace and work ethic. His north-south game paired with his impressive speed and strength made him difficult to stop off the rush.
